parameters.query: SELECT id, username, password_hash, role, locked_until, failed_attempts FROM admin_users WHERE username = $1 LIMIT 1;
INSERT INTO admin_audit (username, action, ip, user_agent, success, detail) VALUES ($1, $2, $3::inet, $4, $5, $6::jsonb);

UPDATE admin_users SET last_login_at = NOW(), last_login_ip = $2::inet, failed_attempts = 0, locked_until = NULL WHERE username = $1 AND $3 = true; UPDATE admin_users SET failed_attempts = COALESCE(failed_attempts,0) + 1, locked_until = CASE WHEN COALESCE(failed_attempts,0) + 1 >= 5 THEN NOW() + INTERVAL '15 minutes' ELSE locked_until END WHERE username = $1 AND $3 = false;
